pr.title: begin restructuring StateVars struct - ftFox complete
pr.author: VetriTheRetri

summary: Began a broader Fighter StateVars restructuring by adding per-character StateVars headers and completing the ftFox migration from raw x2340/x2344/etc. aliases to named move-specific fields such as foxVars[0].specialN.isBlasterLoop, specialHi.gravityDelay, specialS.ghostEffectPos, specialLw.releaseLag, and appealS.animCount. The PR also moved substantial Captain Falcon SpecialN/SpecialS code out of asm into C, renamed several flags/callback fields to more descriptive names, and introduced a central ftstatevars.h include to aggregate the new state-var definitions. There was no PR body or review-comment text; the available review evidence is approval-only.
what_changed: Added ftFox_StateVars.h with a union ftFoxStateVars containing move-specific structs for specialN, specialS, specialHi, specialLw, and appealS, all documenting their 0x2340+ overlay offsets.
Replaced many ftFox raw state-var accesses such as x2340_stateVar1, x2344_stateVar2, x2348_stateVar3, and x234C_stateVar4 with named fields under fp->foxVars[0].*.
Added ftstatevars.h as an umbrella header for existing StateVar headers and a ftCommonStateVars union for common ledge/cliff state.

Extended Fighter in fighter.h with zero-length typed overlays at 0x2340: commonVars, captainVars, foxVars, nessVars, luigiVars, and gameWatchVars, while retaining old raw x2340 aliases during transition.
Added new character StateVars headers for Captain, Ness, Luigi, and Game & Watch, not just Fox.
Updated ftcliffcommon.c from raw x2340_stateVar1 ledge storage to commonVars[0].CliffCommon.ledgeID.

Converted Captain Falcon SpecialN and SpecialS from asm objects into C source files and updated obj_files.mk to build ftCaptain.c, ftCaptain_SpecialN.c, and ftCaptain_SpecialS.c instead of ftCaptain_1.c and two ftfalcon asm files.
Renamed Captain special-attribute flags from x222C/x2230 to x222C_isSpecialSStartGFX and x2230_isSpecialSGFX.

Renamed several Fighter action-state flags from unknown names to inferred names such as FIGHTER_MODEL_NOUPDATE, FIGHTER_COLANIM_NOUPDATE, FIGHTER_RUMBLE_NOUPDATE, FIGHTER_MODELPART_VIS_NOUPDATE, FIGHTER_MODEL_FLAG_NOUPDATE, and FIGHTER_ATTACKCOUNT_NOUPDATE.
Renamed Fox SpecialS helper prototypes/calls from ftFox_SpecialS_CopyStructVars and ftFox_SpecialS_GetFloatVar to ftFox_SpecialS_CopyGhostPosIndexed and ftFox_SpecialS_ReturnFloatVarIndexed.

Made additional naming/type cleanups including input.x65C_heldInputs, x20AC as HSD_GObj*, SFX_PAN_MID usage in Fox blaster/throw paths, HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_* defines, and item hit log field split into tipLog and damageLog.
smart_moves: Used typed zero-length arrays like foxVars[0] at the existing Fighter 0x2340 state-var offset, allowing clearer field names without changing layout.
Kept the legacy raw x2340/x2344 aliases in Fighter while introducing typed overlays, making the StateVars migration incremental instead of forcing all fighters to convert at once.
Grouped per-character state vars by action/move in unions, matching the way the same 0x2340 storage is reused by different action states.
Documented offsets and inferred meanings directly in the new StateVars structs, which preserves reverse-engineering context for future matching work.
Centralized StateVars includes in ftstatevars.h so Fighter can reference per-character state-var types from one location during the transition.
Renamed helper functions based on observed behavior and arguments, e.g. CopyGhostPosIndexed and ReturnFloatVarIndexed, making item/asm call sites more searchable.
Paired struct-field cleanup with C decompilation of Captain Falcon specials, reducing asm surface while making state/callback intent clearer.
decomp_lessons: For shared scratch regions like Fighter 0x2340, a union of move-specific structs is a good migration path: it gives semantic names while preserving the exact ABI/layout.
Do not remove old raw aliases immediately when many fighters still depend on them; layered typed overlays let later PRs convert one character or move at a time.
StateVars headers should include offset comments and usage notes because many fields are otherwise indistinguishable integers/floats reused by multiple actions.
Function names should describe indexed data movement when known; ftFox_SpecialS_CopyGhostPosIndexed is more useful than a generic CopyStructVars name.
Action-state flag renames can improve readability across many fighter files, but should be grounded in repeated use patterns and kept consistent in macros.
When converting asm to C, update obj_files.mk in the same PR so object ordering/build inputs reflect the decompiled source replacement.
naming_conventions: Per-character state-var header pattern: ft<Char>_StateVars.h, e.g. ftFox_StateVars.h, ftCaptain_StateVars.h, ftNess_StateVars.h.
Per-character union type pattern: ftFoxStateVars, ftCaptainStateVars, ftNessStateVars, ftLuigiStateVars, ftGameWatchStateVars.
Fighter overlay field pattern: fp->foxVars[0].specialHi.gravityDelay, fp->nessVars[0].SpecialHi.*, fp->luigiVars[0].SpecialS.*, fp->commonVars[0].CliffCommon.ledgeID.
Move-specific structs use action names such as ftFoxSpecialN, ftFoxSpecialS, ftFoxSpecialHi, ftFoxSpecialLw, ftFoxAppealS.
Boolean state fields were renamed with is* prefixes where intent was evident, e.g. isBlasterLoop, isRelease, isMisfire, isSpecialSGFX.
Fighter flags moved away from UNK names toward NOUPDATE/PRESERVE semantics, e.g. FIGHTER_COLANIM_NOUPDATE and FIGHTER_MODEL_NOUPDATE.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed large chunks of Captain Falcon asm from asm/melee/ft/chara/ftCaptain/ftfalcon_1.s and ftfalcon_2.s by adding C implementations in ftCaptain_SpecialN.c and ftCaptain_SpecialS.c.
Updated obj_files.mk to replace asm object inputs with new C object inputs for Captain files, preserving build integration after decompilation.
Kept exact 0x2340 overlay semantics by using typed unions and zero-length arrays rather than changing Fighter struct size or field offsets.
Preserved action-state flag bit patterns while renaming macros, allowing source readability improvements without changing generated behavior when matched.
Maintained asm call-site compatibility for renamed Fox SpecialS helpers by updating declarations and references consistently.
review_feedback: No issue comments or review comments were present in the slice.
Five approval reviews were recorded, including approvals from ribbanya and RevoSucks, but their bodies were empty, so no specific reviewer rationale or requested changes can be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that continue migrating x2340_stateVar aliases into per-character StateVars unions.
Search for remaining direct uses of x2340_stateVar1/x2344_stateVar2 after PR 441.
Compare later ftFox StateVars names to see which unk/unk2 fields were eventually identified.
Review subsequent PRs for action-state flag rename corrections or confirmations.
Check whether ftstatevars.h remained a temporary umbrella or was later finalized/reorganized.
